## What changed and why

<!-- Describe the change and the motivation behind it. Not what the code does — why it exists. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Dependencies

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm test` passes
- [ ] `pnpm tsc --noEmit` passes
- [ ] UI changes include a screenshot
- [ ] New user-facing strings use `useT()` (no hardcoded text)
